zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hanks IV於1498年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利時，他的父親John Hanks III28歲，母親Elizabeth Berger24歲。他於1520年6月19日與Annie在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾邦藍，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾邦藍聖 米可艾爾也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hanks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hanke, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In England this personal name was a shortened form of both Hankin and Hancock , both of which were used as pet forms of Henry . The equivalent Middle Dutch names Hanke and Hankin, however, had the sense ‘young John’ and may have been introduced to England by Flemish settlers after the Conquest. There is no evidence to support the suggestion that an English hereditary surname was formed from the Old Norse personal name Anki, a diminutive of personal names such as Arngrim and Arnketill.

variants.name: Hankes
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Khanke (a pet form of Khane, from Hebrew Ḥanna; see Hanna 6), with the Yiddish possessive suffix -s.

variants.name: Hankin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yaron, Abbe, Isadore, Myer, Yitzhak.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hankin, a pet form of Hann , which in English usage was usually a short form of Hanry (Henry), and occasionally perhaps a rhyming pet form of Randal (Randolph). In Middle Dutch, Hankin was a pet form of Johan (John), a usage which may have been brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no examples have yet been found in Middle English where a man named John was also called Hankin. Compare Henkin , Hanks , and Hancock .
English: from Middle English Handekin, a pet form of the personal name Hand, Hond (see Hand ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Hanks IV was born in 1498, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hanks III, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Berger, was 24. He married Annie on 19 June 1520, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in Buckland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in St Michael's Church, Buckland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hanks IVが1498年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで生まれた時，父John Hanks IIIは28歳，母Elizabeth Bergerは24歳であった。1520年6月19日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでAnnieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブックランドで死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブックランドスト ミチャエル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Michael's Church, Buckland, Tewkes: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 벅랜드 스트 믹하얼'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Hanks IV(이)가 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hanks III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Berger(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1520년 6월 19일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Annie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 벅랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 벅랜드 스트 믹하얼'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

Он умер в местности буккланд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел'с чурч, буккланд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
